title: IBPS PO 2026
meta_description: IBPS PO 2026 — exam pattern, syllabus, eligibility, salary, and preparation guide for Probationary Officer in public sector banks.

hero.one_liner: Probationary Officer recruitment in 11 public sector banks — SBI not included (separate exam)

key_details.label: Education
key_details.value: Bachelor's degree from any recognized university

exam_pattern.description: Qualifying exam with sectional cutoffs. You must clear cutoff in EACH section.
Merit exam. Objective (200 marks) + Descriptive English (25 marks).

major_posts.department: Public Sector Banks (PNB, BOB, Canara, Union, etc.)

preparation_tips: IBPS PO Prelims has sectional cutoffs — you MUST score minimum in each section. Don't ignore English even if you're strong in Math.
For Mains, Banking/Economy Awareness is the differentiator. Read monthly banking capsules and know recent RBI policies, mergers, and financial terms.
Practice 50+ mock tests for Prelims speed. You have 36 seconds per question. Attempt accuracy over quantity — negative marking hurts.
English descriptive paper (letter + essay) in Mains is often neglected. Practice writing 2-3 letters and essays per week. Keep it structured and grammatically clean.

faqs.question: Does IBPS PO include SBI?
faqs.answer: No. SBI conducts its own separate PO exam (SBI PO). IBPS PO covers 11 other public sector banks: PNB, BOB, Canara, Union Bank, Indian Bank, Bank of India, Central Bank, UCO Bank, Bank of Maharashtra, Punjab & Sind Bank, and Indian Overseas Bank.

faqs.question: What is the salary of IBPS PO?
faqs.answer: Starting basic pay is ₹36,000/month. With DA, HRA, and other allowances, in-hand salary ranges from ₹42,000 (rural posting) to ₹52,000 (metro posting) in the first year. Grows to ₹63,000+ within 4-5 years.

faqs.question: Can final year students apply?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can apply if you're in the final year of graduation. You must have the degree by the time of joining/document verification.

faqs.question: Is there a sectional time limit in Prelims?
faqs.answer: Yes. 20 minutes for each section. You cannot switch between sections.
